factory_a.title_zh: 研究工厂(Core Thesis + 前向验证)

registrations.conviction: STARTER_CAPPED_UNTIL_E1 — and WATCH_NOT_CONVICTION at the current reference price (R/R < 2:1; see reward_to_risk)

WATCH_ONLY — R/R at the 2026-06-11 live price (≈0.43) is FAR below the 2:1 bar and even the committed split-adjusted reference (≈1.98) misses it; STARTER eligibility begins only at the add zone (≤~139, where the bar is met) or on a post-E1 re-band. No position at current price.

WATCH_ONLY — R/R at the 2026-06-11 live price (≈0.29) is FAR below the 2:1 bar; even the committed 5/08 reference gives ≈0.87. STARTER eligibility begins only at the add zone (≤~54.7) or on a post-E1 re-band. No position at current price.

WATCH_ONLY — franchise is real (global memory-interface oligopoly + a genuine mix-driven second curve), but at the committed reference price the R/R is ≈0.11, catastrophically below the 2:1 bar (price has run to the bull scenario). No position. STARTER eligibility begins only at the add zone (≤~150, where the bar is met) or on a fundamentals-driven re-band; near-term supply overhang = 8/9 HK cornerstone unlock.

WATCH_ONLY — franchise is real (sole domestic PECVD + entity-list-locked demand + a genuinely strong FY25 扣非/OCF), so it earns a full deep sheet + checkpoints (NOT NOT_ADVANCED). But at the committed reference price the R/R is NEGATIVE (≈−0.06) — price is at/above the bull scenario and above the only sell-side target (538). No position rationale. Add zone = ≤~383 (2:1 met) OR a fundamentals-driven re-band.

WATCH_CONSTRUCTIVE — thesis and price are both discussable (the rare such name in the AI chain), but at the committed reference price the R/R is ~1.72, BELOW the 2:1 bar. No position. STARTER eligibility begins only at the add zone (owner research trigger ≤~60, or the composer 2:1 bar ≤~68.67) OR on a post-H1 margin/run-rate re-band. NOT a buy.
